derivation_source: Blocked release-candidate record for the tracked curated reader manuscript at source commit 3e59bde35f4aa5147017ddab3159cfeffddc9ee7. The artifacts named here are ignored local review outputs from `python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf`, not approved release artifacts.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; node scripts/validate_reader_html_artifact_browser.js --strict --site build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/html/_reader_site --manifest build/curated_reader_edition/reader_manifest.json --report build/curated_reader_edition/curated_reader_html_browser_report.json; node scripts/validate_curated_reader_wcag_preparation.js --write-manifest
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered local curated reader HTML review tree with 49 pages and 98 of 98 browser page-view pairs passing, including 20 of 20 key-figure page-view pairs. Tracked review digest is 2ca82608207741a56a861da7d32f4d8c7e7a25dc390df3836dca11560b19ce34. The automated keyboard traversal review records 98 page-view pairs, 98 skip-link activations, 98 main-content routes, and 0 keyboard-trap candidates; the keyboard-only evidence decision clears only manual_keyboard_only_review_not_completed. The accessibility-tree release-preparation probe records 98 page-view pairs, 0 failures, 98 accessibility-tree page-view pairs, 0 unnamed interactive elements, 0 image alt failures, 0 table header failures, and 0 duplicate-ID hits. The automated WCAG-preparation gate records 98 page-view pairs, 0 failures, 3,523 rendered text contrast samples, 0 contrast failure samples, and 4.69 minimum contrast ratio; it clears only wcag_conformance_review_not_completed. Blocked: this is not release-approved, not published, not screen-reader reviewed, not third-party/legal WCAG certified, and not the generated-reader HTML artifact approved by the 2026-06-29 record.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; python3 scripts/inspect_curated_reader_format_artifacts.py; python3 scripts/repair_curated_reader_epub_links.py; python3 scripts/audit_curated_reader_epub_content.py; node scripts/validate_curated_reader_epub_browser_review.js --write-manifest; python3 scripts/validate_reader_epub_apple_books_review.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected local EPUB review artifact: 8,670,899 bytes, SHA-256 412fadecd308acfc966e624c17aece7cc53bc4ef9f818e4f865fdb2f0ed6be28, 52 XHTML entries, 62 image entries, OPF title The ASI Stack, creator Corben Sorenson, and language en-US. The repaired EPUB package audit records SHA-256 bca694bc97bdfbc1757d58368df9d5d3f2e6152615938a80c7eab0b2a5519255, 52 XHTML entries checked, 49 packaged content XHTML entries checked, 0 unresolved internal hrefs, 0 XML parse errors, 0 bare class attribute hits, and 0 paragraph-wrapped figure tag hits. The Chromium EPUB XHTML browser review records 104 browser page-view pairs, 0 browser failures, 0 px maximum element overflow, and 0 image load failures. The EPUB key-figure layout review records 10 matched key-figure SVG titles, 10 key-figure XHTML entries, 20 key-figure page-view pairs, 0 key-figure browser failures, 15628 minimum body text characters, 23 minimum alt-text words, 0 px maximum horizontal overflow, 2 minimum image count, and 0 image failures. Apple Books opened the repaired EPUB digest bca694bc97bdfbc1757d58368df9d5d3f2e6152615938a80c7eab0b2a5519255 without the earlier XML error banner, rendered the Reader Edition Baseline page, rendered chapter 1 with the ASI Stack control-plane figure and descriptive alt text in the accessibility tree, and opened the table of contents; this clears only the app/e-reader review blocker. Blocked: the EPUB is not release-approved, not published, and has no approved edition release record.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; python3 scripts/inspect_curated_reader_format_artifacts.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected local DOCX review artifact: 8,331,414 bytes, SHA-256 e248469162e3a28c48a0c277980c59dc64396622b88cbc670ae8c9f6a94430c5, 77 zip entries, 61 PNG media entries, 0 SVG media entries, and 17,462 paragraph markers. The repaired DOCX package audit records SHA-256 e5e70200ed19b58d232c315b5e6aa88a753fe95a01c6ec25e1abeede02ab2713, 17,462 paragraphs, 286 relationships, 0 raw .qmd relationship targets, 0 unresolved internal relationship targets, and 10 matched key-figure stems. The LibreOffice headless Writer review converted the repaired DOCX to a 512-page PDF, checked 1,048,398 text characters, raster-checked 512 converted pages, and found 0 blank, 0 low-ink, and 0 near-edge converted-page rasters. The DOCX key-figure layout review records 10 key-figure title pages, 10 rastered key-figure pages, 72.1 pt minimum title margin, 9.92% minimum page ink, 0.0% maximum near-edge ink, and 38.23 minimum luminance standard deviation. The DOCX application-evidence decision accepts the available local application-engine evidence and Pages-readable text fallback for release preparation, clearing only docx_application_review_not_completed. Blocked: this DOCX is not release-approved, not published, and has no approved edition release record; Word, LibreOffice GUI, Google Docs, and manual document approval are not claimed.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; python3 scripts/inspect_curated_reader_format_artifacts.py; python3 scripts/audit_curated_reader_pdf_layout.py

The all-page raster probe records 511 rendered pages, 0 blank pages, 1 low-ink page, 0 near-edge pages, and 10 matched key-figure captions. The extracted-text reading-flow review records 511 nonempty text pages, 44 ordered chapter headings, 3 ordered appendix headings, and 0 replacement characters. The page-by-page PDF release-preparation review records 511 page rows, 511 text pages, 511 word-box pages, 511 raster pages, 0 failed pages, 0 blank pages, 0 near-edge pages, 0 out-of-bounds word-box pages, and one accepted low-ink page. The headed Chromium PDF viewer smoke review records 2 nonblank viewer screenshots and 4.479% changed pixels after scroll. The PDF key-figure layout review records 10 key-figure caption pages, 10 rastered key-figure pages, 165.878 pt minimum caption margin, 3.36% minimum page ink, 0.0% maximum near-edge ink, and 14.2 minimum luminance standard deviation. The final figure-artifact review records 10 key figures and clears only the current candidate's final figure-artifact blocker. Blocked: the PDF is not release-approved.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/validate_reader_epub_apple_books_review.py; Apple Books (com.apple.iBooksX) local application review via Computer Use
artifact_formats.notes: Apple Books application review passed for repaired curated EPUB digest bca694bc97bdfbc1757d58368df9d5d3f2e6152615938a80c7eab0b2a5519255. The review opened the current local EPUB in Apple Books, rendered the Reader Edition Baseline page and chapter 1 without the earlier XML error banner, exposed the ASI Stack control-plane figure and descriptive alt text, and opened the table of contents. It clears only app_or_ereader_review_not_completed for the current repaired EPUB path. Blocked: this is not EPUB publication approval, not a full e-reader visual acceptance decision, not a reader release approval, and not an edition release record.

Blocked: no MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifact exists; the current audio-script probe is a preparation workspace only. The automated audio-script reading-flow review checks 49 scripts, 49 ordered markers, 66 narration notes, and 1,089,681 text characters in book order; the script-level narration treatment review clears only narration_quality_review_not_completed; and the audio metadata review clears only audio_metadata_not_reviewed by recording title, version, source commit/tag, script digest, narrator/tooling boundary, and rights-statement fields. This is not pronunciation review, not recorded-audio spot check, not chapter timecoding, not audio generation, not audio publication-rights approval, and not audio release approval.

format_probe_closure.release_boundary: The automated package, link, text, raster, automated PNG raster, PDF Mermaid fallback, key-figure, EPUB key-figure layout, PDF key-figure layout, DOCX key-figure layout, browser, PDF viewer smoke, PDF page-by-page release-preparation review, source-geometry, source-level visual identity, source-level accessibility/navigation, automated keyboard traversal, keyboard-only evidence decision, accessibility-tree release-preparation probe, automated WCAG-preparation gate, final figure-artifact review, Apple Books EPUB application review, DOCX application-evidence decision, audio-script reading-flow probe, script-level audio narration treatment review, and audio metadata review support release preparation only. The keyboard-only evidence decision clears only manual_keyboard_only_review_not_completed, the automated WCAG-preparation gate clears only wcag_conformance_review_not_completed for the current curated HTML candidate, the aggregate final figure-artifact review clears the current final-figure blocker, the Apple Books review clears only the current app/e-reader review blocker, the DOCX application-evidence decision clears only the current docx_application_review_not_completed blocker, the audio narration treatment review clears only narration_quality_review_not_completed, and the audio metadata review clears only audio_metadata_not_reviewed. These records do not clear screen-reader review, assistive-technology review, third-party/legal WCAG certification, audio file generation, pronunciation/listening review, chapter timecoding, audio publication-rights approval, audio release approval, or reader release approval, and do not approve EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, or the curated reader edition.

review_status.notes: Curated reader chapter-level reconciliation, chapter reconciliation approval, local HTML browser viability, repaired EPUB package/content navigation, Chromium EPUB XHTML browser review, Apple Books EPUB application review, EPUB key-figure layout review, repaired DOCX relationship integrity, LibreOffice headless DOCX conversion/raster review, DOCX key-figure layout review, DOCX application-evidence decision, PDF-safe Mermaid fallback rendering, all-page PDF text/bounding-box extraction, all-page low-resolution PDF raster smoke testing, PDF extracted-text reading-flow review, PDF page-by-page release-preparation review, PDF key-figure layout review, final figure-artifact review, audio-script reading-flow review, audio narration treatment review, audio metadata review, key-figure package/text survival, source-geometry review, source-level visual identity review, source-level accessibility/navigation review, automated keyboard traversal review, keyboard-only evidence decision, accessibility-tree release-preparation probe, automated WCAG-preparation gate, and automated PNG raster review are recorded. Release-quality continuity, Word/LibreOffice GUI/Google Docs DOCX review as separate non-claimed evidence, manual aesthetic review, visual identity approval, screen-reader review, audio file generation, audio pronunciation/listening review, chapter-marker timecoding, audio release approval, and reader release approval remain open. This record intentionally preserves blockers rather than approving artifacts.

reader_manuscript.review_notes: The tracked curated reader manuscript has 44 reconciled chapter records, no missing curated chapter files, and a chapter reconciliation approval record that clears only curated_reconciliation_not_approved. All chapter records still preserve format_artifact_not_reviewed and reader_release_record_not_created until final format review and a future release approval record explicitly clear them. The automated WCAG-preparation gate now records 98 desktop/mobile page-view pairs, 3,523 rendered text contrast samples, 0 contrast failures, and 4.69 minimum contrast ratio, clearing only wcag_conformance_review_not_completed for the current curated HTML candidate while preserving screen-reader review and reader release approval.

audio_package.review_notes: The audio-script workspace is generated for review only and has an automated reading-flow/order review, a script-level narration treatment review that clears only narration_quality_review_not_completed, and a metadata review that clears only audio_metadata_not_reviewed. No pronunciation approval, recorded-audio listening approval, chapter timing, audio files, MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB package exists or is approved.

companion_material.review_notes: Companion notes exist for dense figure/e-reader/audio support, but they are not released as standalone artifacts and do not replace meaning-critical prose.

The generated script has automated reading-flow/order review, script-level narration treatment review, and metadata review only; no pronunciation review, recorded-audio spot check, chapter timecoding, audio artifact, MP3, M4B, audio-embedded EPUB, audio edition release record, or audio release approval exists.

release_notes: Blocked curated reader release-candidate record. It records exact current local HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, source-reconciliation, keyboard-only, accessibility-tree, and automated WCAG-preparation state for the tracked curated reader manuscript. It does not approve, publish, archive, or tag any curated reader artifact.
residuals: Chapter reconciliation approval clears curated_reconciliation_not_approved for the current 44 curated chapter records only; it does not clear format artifact review, reader release approval, application/accessibility review, audio gates, or any claim support state.
format_artifact_not_reviewed remains active on all 44 curated chapter records until exact format review is complete.
reader_release_record_not_created remains active for approved curated reader artifacts; this record is explicitly blocked and partial.
full_format_artifact_review_not_completed remains active for EPUB and DOCX.
Apple Books EPUB application review clears app_or_ereader_review_not_completed for the current repaired EPUB digest only; reader release approval and the edition release record remain active.
The PDF page-by-page release-preparation review closes the current candidate's page-by-page PDF review blocker, but reader release approval remains active.

Automated repaired-package EPUB/DOCX checks, Chromium EPUB XHTML browser review, Apple Books EPUB application review, LibreOffice headless DOCX conversion/raster review, the DOCX application-evidence decision, PDF-safe Mermaid fallbacks, all-page PDF raster checks, PDF extracted-text reading-flow checks, PDF page-by-page release-preparation checks, audio-script reading-flow checks, the script-level audio narration treatment review, the audio metadata review, and key-figure package/text survival checks are recorded as preparation evidence only. Source-geometry review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks SVG viewBox, visible source bounds, text anchors, entity counts, and draft/non-release status, but it does not clear raster review, manual aesthetic review, e-reader review, DOCX/PDF application review, visual identity approval, or release approval, and is not the aggregate final figure-artifact review by itself.

Source-level visual identity review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks stylesheet tokens, source SVG accessibility metadata, palette diversity, and carried contrast metrics, but it does not clear manual aesthetic review, e-reader review, DOCX/PDF application review, visual identity approval, or release approval, and is not the aggregate final figure-artifact review by itself.

Source-level accessibility/navigation review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks tracked reader source headings, one-H1 chapter shape, handoff sections, draft figure alt texts, figure boundary paragraphs, live-scaffold leakage, raw claim-marker leakage, and release-blocker preservation, but it does not clear keyboard-only review, screen-reader review, WCAG conformance, e-reader review, audiobook review, or release approval.

Automated keyboard traversal review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 98 desktop/mobile curated-reader HTML page-view pairs, 98 skip-link activations, 98 main-content routes, navigation and search reachability, and 0 keyboard trap candidates. The separate keyboard-only evidence decision clears only manual_keyboard_only_review_not_completed; the traversal review itself does not clear screen-reader review, WCAG conformance, e-reader review, audiobook review, or release approval.

Keyboard-only evidence decision clears only manual_keyboard_only_review_not_completed for the current curated reader HTML candidate; it does not perform screen-reader review, does not certify WCAG conformance, does not create reader release approval, does not publish or approve curated reader HTML, and does not promote any chapter core claim or support state.

Automated accessibility-tree release-preparation probe is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 98 desktop/mobile curated-reader HTML page-view pairs for language, title, one-H1 shape, landmarks, skip links, focus-visible styling, accessible names, image alt text, table headers, duplicate IDs, live-marker leakage, raw core-claim marker leakage, and Chromium accessibility-tree availability, but it does not clear screen-reader review, e-reader review, audiobook review, or release approval.

Automated WCAG-preparation gate is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 98 desktop/mobile curated-reader HTML page-view pairs, 3,523 visible text contrast samples, 0 contrast failures, 0 unnamed interactive elements, 0 image alt failures, 0 table header failures, 0 duplicate-ID hits, and 4.69 minimum contrast ratio, and clears only wcag_conformance_review_not_completed for the current curated HTML candidate. It does not perform screen-reader or assistive-technology review, does not provide third-party or legal WCAG certification, does not approve reader release, and does not promote any chapter support state.

Automated PNG raster review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks generated fallback dimensions, nonblank luminance variation, color diversity, opaque coverage, and per-artifact digests, but it does not clear manual aesthetic review, e-reader visual review, DOCX/PDF application review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

Final figure-artifact review clears the current candidate's final_figure_artifact_review_not_completed blocker by aggregating source accessibility, contrast, geometry, visual identity, PNG raster fallback health, EPUB package/layout survival, PDF caption-page layout, and DOCX converted title-page layout; it does not approve the curated reader edition or any downstream application, accessibility, audio, or release gate.

EPUB key-figure layout review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 10 key-figure XHTML entries, 20 key-figure page-view pairs, 0 key-figure browser failures, 10 px maximum horizontal overflow, 0 image failures, figure boundaries, release boundaries, alt text, and body-text presence, but it does not clear dedicated e-reader device review, does not clear e-reader application approval, visual identity approval, or release approval; the separate Apple Books EPUB application review is the record that clears the app/e-reader blocker.

PDF key-figure layout review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 10 key-figure caption pages, caption-page raster dimensions, 165.878 pt minimum caption margin, page ink, near-edge ink absence, and luminance variation, but it does not clear visual identity approval or release approval.

DOCX key-figure layout review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 10 key-figure title pages in the LibreOffice-converted DOCX PDF, title-page raster dimensions, 72.1 pt minimum title margin, page ink, near-edge ink absence, and luminance variation, but it does not clear Word review, does not clear LibreOffice GUI review, does not clear Google Docs review, does not clear manual document review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

Audio metadata review clears only audio_metadata_not_reviewed by checking title, version, source commit/tag, script digest, narrator/tooling boundary, and rights-statement fields; it does not approve a narrator, synthesis tool, audio publication rights, audio files, chapter-marker timing, listening quality, packaging, or audio release.

Visual identity approval, e-reader visual review beyond the Apple Books application smoke path, audio pronunciation/listening review, audio file generation, chapter-marker timecoding, and audio-embedded EPUB packaging remain incomplete.
